rationale: Both correctly diagnose the base-tokenizer/instruct-config mismatch at the same code lines and cite the same Tencent reference and FayeSpica workaround, so grounding on the core diagnosis is comparable. X correctly reads Gaohan123's 'open a new issue' as closing this bug (workaround confirmed) with follow-up tracked separately, while Y recommends 'keep-open,' which contradicts the thread's clear signal; Y also injects an ungrounded GPU/NPU-count claim and a truncated placeholder comment URL. X also explicitly attributes the regression to PR #2713's topology change more thoroughly integrated into a single coherent maintainer-style response, whereas Y reads more like a raw tool/report artifact with duplicated sections.
